name_cn:
【Black with Silver Buckle】
LouLou_Large
A large bag you'll fall in love with at first glance!!️ Lightweight and spacious. Imported Italian fine cowhide with a flip-over magnetic closure for convenience and security. A must-have for daily commuting and leisure. A timeless piece that will never go out of style. Get this unisex bag for casual commuting or outings. Spacious and lightweight!
Model: 574947
Size: 36×27×14cm
